inputs.label: Building Width
inputs.businessContext: Total width of the building from outer wall to outer wall (center to center of wall plates)

businessContext_i18n.en: Total width of the building from outer wall to outer wall (center to center of wall plates)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Binanın dış duvardan dış duvara toplam genişliği (duvar levhalarının merkezleri arası)
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtbreite des Gebäudes von Außenwand zu Außenwand (Mitte zu Mitte der Mauerlatten).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur totale du bâtiment d'un mur extérieur à l'autre (centre à centre des sablières)
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho total del edificio de pared exterior a pared exterior (centro a centro de las placas de pared)

inputs.label: Ridge Board Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Thickness of the ridge board at the apex

businessContext_i18n.en: Thickness of the ridge board at the apex
businessContext_i18n.fr: Épaisseur de la panne faîtière au sommet
businessContext_i18n.es: Espesor de la tabla cumbrera en el vértice

inputs.label: Eaves Overhang
inputs.businessContext: Horizontal projection of the rafter tail beyond the outer wall

businessContext_i18n.en: Horizontal projection of the rafter tail beyond the outer wall
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mertek kuyruğunun dış duvarın ötesindeki yatay izdüşümü
businessContext_i18n.de: Horizontaler Überstand des Sparrenendes über die Außenwand hinaus
businessContext_i18n.fr: Projection horizontale du pied de chevron au-delà du mur extérieur
businessContext_i18n.es: Proyección horizontal de la cola de la viga más allá de la pared exterior

inputs.label: Roof Pitch Angle
inputs.businessContext: Angle of the roof slope from horizontal, in degrees

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle of the roof slope from horizontal, in degrees
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çatı eğiminin yatayla yaptığı açı (derece cinsinden)
businessContext_i18n.de: Winkel der Dachneigung von der Horizontalen, in Grad
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle de la pente du toit par rapport à l'horizontale, en degrés
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo de la pendiente del techo desde la horizontal, en grados

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
